rulings.Case Title: HOUSING RIGHTS COMMITTEE OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. VIC YANG ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Motion To Strike And Demurrer To Complaint And Motion To Strike; Proof Of Service
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 29, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT ROBERT WANG's Motion To Strike And Demurrer To Complaint Proof Of Service SUSTAINED with leave to amend (1) as to the first cause of action to allege HRC is an interested party and has tried to exhaust or pursue administrative remedies; (2) as to the second cause of action to pray for non-damage relief, or to remove HRC as Plaintiff and add HRC's member-tenants as Plaintiffs; (3) as to the third cause of action to remove HRC as Plaintiff and add HRC's member-tenants as Plaintiffs. Motion to Strike is GRANTED in part with leave to amend and MOOT in part. (1) the attorney's fees prayer is moot because Defendant's demurrer was sustained; (2) sustained as to the injunctive relief prayer with leave to amend to allege Defendant has failed to comply with S.F. Ordinance No. 218-214's requirements after January 31, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWAR L WESTON VS. MIMI LAY
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Pursuant To Ccp 437c(F)(1)/ And Notice Of Motion
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 29, 2015 line 3. PLAINTIFF HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWARD L WESTON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Pursuant To Ccp 437c(F)(1) DENIED. Plaintiff lists in the moving papers purported undisputed material facts as to each affirmative defense to be summarily adjudicated. There is a triable issue of material fact as to fact #15. (See Weston Declaration 10 vs. William Declaration3, Daw Than Declaration 2, Mimi Declaration 3 and Ex. 2.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GUO XIN TAN VS. SONIA SOCORRO GUTIERREZ ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Alba, Aka Mrs. Luis Cupul Ucan Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 29, 2015 line 7. Defendant Alba, Aka Mrs. Luis Cupul Ucan Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain burden under CCP 473(b) for discretionary relief. Moving party was on notice of the case since at least June 29, 2015 and Defendant's counsel was advised that Plaintiff will "follow through with obtaining a judgment and writ of execution" as of July 23, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MELLISSA GARBIRAS VS. TRAVIS ROWLAND ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 29, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT TRAVIS ROWLAND's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to October 2, 2015 pending issuance of an order invalidating the filing of the complaint fro failure to pay fees. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LIU QUN WU VS. TRUC LAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, September 29, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT TRUC LAM's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Causes of action for unlawful detainer are sufficiently alleged. Defendant improperly raises issues of fact. = (501/REQ)
